problem_discovery.title: Problem Discovery
problem_discovery.summary: The idea assumes users want an AI social network that predicts mood-compatible weekend activities and lets brands sponsor those plans.
key_points: No credible evidence of sustained user pain or willingness to pay exists.
The concept mixes social discovery, lifestyle advice, and branded commerce without a clear core job to be done.
problem_discovery.raw_text:
The idea assumes users want an AI social network that predicts mood-compatible weekend activities and lets brands sponsor those plans.
- No credible evidence of sustained user pain or willingness to pay exists.
- The concept mixes social discovery, lifestyle advice, and branded commerce without a clear core job to be done.

product_vision.title: Product Vision
product_vision.summary: MoodMesh would combine mood tracking, generative activity suggestions, friend matching, and sponsored recommendations in one consumer app.
key_points: The product vision is broad and unfocused.
User trust and privacy implications are not addressed.
product_vision.raw_text:
MoodMesh would combine mood tracking, generative activity suggestions, friend matching, and sponsored recommendations in one consumer app.
- The product vision is broad and unfocused.
- User trust and privacy implications are not addressed.

competitive_landscape.title: Competitive Landscape
competitive_landscape.summary: The concept competes indirectly with social apps, recommendation apps, wellness products, and local discovery tools, none of which it clearly outperforms.
key_points: Differentiation rests mainly on novelty.
Switching incentives are weak.
competitive_landscape.raw_text:
The concept competes indirectly with social apps, recommendation apps, wellness products, and local discovery tools, none of which it clearly outperforms.
- Differentiation rests mainly on novelty.
- Switching incentives are weak.

business_requirements.title: Business Requirements
business_requirements.summary: Revenue assumptions depend on rapid consumer scale and premium brand sponsorship without a tested acquisition model.
key_points: CAC assumptions are absent.
No realistic funding or monetization path is described.
business_requirements.raw_text:
Revenue assumptions depend on rapid consumer scale and premium brand sponsorship without a tested acquisition model.
- CAC assumptions are absent.
- No realistic funding or monetization path is described.

product_requirements.title: Product Requirements
product_requirements.summary: Product requirements are high-level concepts rather than implementable workflows.
key_points: No clear MVP boundary exists.
Safety controls for user-generated and model-generated content are not defined.
product_requirements.raw_text:
Product requirements are high-level concepts rather than implementable workflows.
- No clear MVP boundary exists.
- Safety controls for user-generated and model-generated content are not defined.

architecture_system_design.title: Architecture & System Design
architecture_system_design.summary: The architecture description is limited to a mobile app, a recommendation engine, and social feed concepts.
key_points: No detail exists on scalability, moderation, or data governance.
Technical feasibility depends on assumptions that are not documented.
architecture_system_design.raw_text:
The architecture description is limited to a mobile app, a recommendation engine, and social feed concepts.
- No detail exists on scalability, moderation, or data governance.
- Technical feasibility depends on assumptions that are not documented.

ai_agents_ethical_framework.title: AI Agents & Ethical Framework
ai_agents_ethical_framework.summary: The concept uses AI for mood inference and recommendations but provides no evaluation, privacy, or consent framework.
key_points: The product would process sensitive personal signals.
No risk controls or redress mechanisms are described.
ai_agents_ethical_framework.raw_text:
The concept uses AI for mood inference and recommendations but provides no evaluation, privacy, or consent framework.
- The product would process sensitive personal signals.
- No risk controls or redress mechanisms are described.

operational_resilience.title: Operational Resilience
operational_resilience.summary: Operations, moderation, support, and abuse handling are largely absent from the plan.
key_points: The app would be vulnerable to trust and safety failures.
No on-call or incident model is proposed.
operational_resilience.raw_text:
Operations, moderation, support, and abuse handling are largely absent from the plan.
- The app would be vulnerable to trust and safety failures.
- No on-call or incident model is proposed.

mvp_roadmap.title: MVP Roadmap
mvp_roadmap.summary: The roadmap expects a viral launch within eight weeks and monetization shortly afterward.
key_points: Milestones are unrealistic.
Critical validation steps are skipped.
mvp_roadmap.raw_text:
The roadmap expects a viral launch within eight weeks and monetization shortly afterward.
- Milestones are unrealistic.
- Critical validation steps are skipped.

success_metrics.title: Success Metrics
success_metrics.summary: Success metrics focus on vanity growth measures instead of retention, monetization quality, or trust outcomes.
key_points: Daily active users is the only explicit target.
No retention or safety KPI is defined.
success_metrics.raw_text:
Success metrics focus on vanity growth measures instead of retention, monetization quality, or trust outcomes.
- Daily active users is the only explicit target.
- No retention or safety KPI is defined.

post_launch_strategy.title: Post Launch Strategy
post_launch_strategy.summary: The post-launch strategy assumes international expansion, brand deals, and creator partnerships without a validated home market.
key_points: Expansion assumptions are premature.
There is no realistic go-to-market sequence.
post_launch_strategy.raw_text:
The post-launch strategy assumes international expansion, brand deals, and creator partnerships without a validated home market.
- Expansion assumptions are premature.
- There is no realistic go-to-market sequence.
